shapes.frame_eqs_str: a['ang']=((a['ang']+(a['time']*a['t']))+a['bass']); a['sides']=a['sidesin']; a['x']=(a['x']+((a['bass']*0.01)*Math.sin((a['time']*((a['bass']*5)*Math.sin((a['time']*5))))))); a['y']=(a['y']+((a['treb']*0.01)*Math.sin((a['time']*((a['treb']*5)*Math.sin((a['time']*5))))))); a['a']=a['inneralpha']; a['a2']=a['outeralpha']; a['r2']=a['red']; a['g2']=a['green']; a['b2']=a['blue']; a['border_a']=((Math.abs(above(a['bass'], 1.7))>0.00001)?(1):(0)); a['r']=(a['bass']*0.5); a['g']=(a['treb']*0.5); a['b']=(a['mid']*0.5); a['rad']=((Math.abs(above(a['bass'], 1.7))>0.00001)?((a['rad']*a['bass'])):(a['rad']));
